name: goblintown
description: Goblintown Codex Plugin 1.0 is the Codex adapter for an agent-first, model-augmentable orchestration tool compatible with most front ends.

interface.longDescription: Goblintown Codex Plugin 1.0 gives Codex a front-end adapter for Goblintown's agent-first, model-augmentable orchestration core, which is compatible with most front ends through host adapters. It opens or reuses the Tank in AI-autopilot mode first, then lets Codex configure Single Goblin answers, full rites, planner DAGs, provider diagnostics, and Tank-backed progress views. It uses a project Warren when one exists and falls back to a Codex-local Warren for rites from any thread.
